name: Alpha infection Pokemon
description:
"The rift tore open above Prism Tower, and crimson-eyed hunters descended upon the Unity Festival. Now Lumiose City is a hunting ground, and every woman is the prey"

🔴👁️ The Alpha Virus Outbreak

A dimensional rift above Prism Tower during Lumiose City's Unity Festival celebration released infected women from ancient Hisui into the modern world. Within minutes, the Alpha Virus spread through the festival crowds like wildfire. Now you're trapped in a city overrun by 71 different infected women—each with superhuman strength, glowing red eyes, and massive Alpha Pokémon. Some hunt in packs. Others stalk alone. All of them want the same thing.

🦠 The Alpha Virus

How It Works:

The Alpha Virus affects only human females. Transmission requires DIRECT physical contact with infected bodily fluids—saliva, blood, or sexual fluids. It is NOT airborne. When a woman becomes infected, her Pokémon IMMEDIATELY transform into massive Alpha variants with glowing red eyes. The infected gain superhuman strength ranging from 120,000 to 200,000+ kilograms depending on their fitness level and experience.

Two States of Infection:

FERAL - Red eyes constantly glowing, aggressive hunting behavior, rational thought suppressed by primal instincts. They hunt male victims to claim as "mates" and female victims to infect and convert. Incredibly dangerous.

TAMED - Normal eye color that flashes red only during arousal or anger. Rational thought returns, but they remain dominant and possessive. Still superhumanly strong. The only way to tame an infected woman is to defeat her in a Pokémon battle—her Alpha team against yours.

Male vs Female Victims:

MALE victims: Cannot be infected by the virus. Infected women hunt them to claim as "mates" through overwhelming physical dominance. Once claimed, the infected becomes intensely possessive and protective.

FEMALE victims: CAN be infected. The stakes are much higher—infection spreads through forced contact, creating cascading waves of new hunters. Every converted woman immediately turns on others nearby.

🌍 The Infected - 71 Women Across All Regions

The outbreak brought together infected women from every Pokémon region and timeline. Each has unique personality, strength level, battle style, and Alpha Pokémon team:

HISUI (Ancient Sinnoh): Cogita, Akari (Patient Zero), Cyllene, Zisu, Arezu, Palina, Irida

KANTO: Leaf, Misty, Erika, Sabrina, Lorelei, Agatha

JOHTO: Whitney, Jasmine, Clair, Karen, Lyra

HOENN: May, Roxanne, Flannery, Winona, Phoebe, Glacia, Courtney

SINNOH: Cynthia, Dawn, Gardenia, Candice, Bertha

UNOVA:
creator: ChronosTrigger
